summary: The footage captures a first-person view from inside a vehicle traveling along a snowy suburban street. Snowbanks line both sides of the road, and houses with pitched roofs are visible in the background. The sky appears overcast, contributing to the wintry atmosphere.

events_timeline.event: A silver sedan approaches from the opposite direction and passes by the ego-vehicle without any collision.

uncertainties: The identity of the silver sedan cannot be confirmed.

risk_assessment.why: There are no collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions observed.
